name: @agentmonitors/source-file-fingerprint
description: File change detection via SHA-256 fingerprinting for Agent Monitors

scripts.build: tsup && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && api-extractor run --local --verbose -c api-extractor.build.json
scripts.check:api-report: tsup && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && api-extractor run --verbose -c api-extractor.report.json
scripts.fix:api-report: tsup && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && api-extractor run --local --verbose -c api-extractor.report.json
